summary: Bug fix verification complete: All 3 bug fixes working correctly. 1) Pay Summary controlled-input bug fixed - inputs use local-state + blur-save pattern, 2) Dashboard card inputs save correctly for guest users - Firestore writes skipped for anonymous users, 3) NaN guards working - all financial setters reject NaN values.

issues: Minor: Chart shows 'width(-1) and height(-1)' warning in console - cosmetic only, chart renders correctly

critical_code_review_comments: VERIFIED: PaySummary.tsx - EditableNumberInput component uses local string state during editing, commits on blur/Enter
VERIFIED: PaySummary.tsx - Input clears to empty when focused if value is 0 (line 44)
VERIFIED: PaySummary.tsx - Reset buttons set values to 0 (line 53)
VERIFIED: FirebaseProvider.tsx lines 219-229 - updateProfile skips Firestore writes for anonymous users
VERIFIED: App.tsx lines 330-388 - All financial setters (setWeeklyEarnings, setMilesThisWeek, setFuelCost, setTruckCost, setWeekDeductions, setTakeHomePercentage) have NaN guards
VERIFIED: Negative values display in red text (pay-weekly-net, pay-monthly-net, pay-yearly-net, pay-net-pay)

test_credentials.guest: Click 'Continue as Guest' button on login screen

context_for_next_testing_agent: All bug fixes verified working: 1) Pay Summary inputs use EditableNumberInput with local-state + blur-save pattern - field stays empty while editing, commits on blur/Enter, reverts on invalid input, 2) Guest users can edit Dashboard cards without Firestore errors - updateProfile skips Firestore for anonymous users, 3) NaN guards in App.tsx prevent invalid values. Note: Firestore REQUEST FAILED errors may appear in console from initial auth listener but don't affect functionality.

pay_truck_cost_input.details: data-testid='pay-truck-cost-input' accepts values, saves on blur, Enter key commits

pay_deductions_input.details: data-testid='pay-deductions-input' accepts values, saves on blur

pay_take_home_pct.details: data-testid='pay-take-home-pct' accepts values 0-100, saves on blur

pay_summary_calculations.details: Weekly Net = (Gross * %) - FuelCost - TruckCost - Deductions calculated correctly

negative_values_red_text.details: Negative values (-$225.00, -$300.00, etc.) display in red text

dashboard_earnings_input.details: data-testid='earnings-input' accepts values, data-testid='earnings-add-btn' saves correctly

cross_page_persistence_dashboard_to_pay.details: Values set in Dashboard persist when navigating to Pay Summary

cross_page_persistence_pay_to_dashboard.details: Values set in Pay Summary persist when navigating to Dashboard and back

guest_login.details: 'Continue as Guest' works, all card inputs functional without Firestore write errors

navigation_map_loads.details: Leaflet map container found, Mapbox satellite tiles load, no map errors

controlled_input_bug_fix.details: Clearing field doesn't snap back to 0, zero clears to empty on focus, Enter commits value

pay_summary_controlled_input_bug.original_issue: Inputs had controlled-input bug where clearing field snapped back to 0
pay_summary_controlled_input_bug.fix_applied: EditableNumberInput component with local-state + blur-save pattern
pay_summary_controlled_input_bug.verification: Field stays empty while editing, commits on blur/Enter, reverts on invalid input

dashboard_card_inputs_not_saving.original_issue: Firestore writes were failing for guest users causing errors
dashboard_card_inputs_not_saving.fix_applied: FirebaseProvider.tsx lines 219-229 skip Firestore writes for anonymous users
dashboard_card_inputs_not_saving.verification: Guest users can add/subtract earnings without errors, values persist in localStorage

nan_guards.original_issue: NaN values could corrupt financial data
nan_guards.fix_applied: All financial setters in App.tsx (lines 330-388) check isNaN(newVal) and return prev if true
nan_guards.verification: Invalid inputs are rejected, previous values preserved
